items.title: Scientists discover why peach fuzz can suddenly make you itch

items.title: Yale scientists found a hidden network inside the eye
items.summary: Researchers have discovered that the retina uses an unexpected communication network that lets separate visual pathways cooperate instead of working alone. A newly identified "commander" cell appears to coordinate this system, helping the eye detect faint details that might otherwise be missed.

items.title: Exercise doesn't just strengthen the heart. It rewires it
